login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to your account

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle_details: Fill in your details to get started
register.subtitle_otp: Enter the verification code sent to your email

forgot_password.request_subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
forgot_password.reset_subtitle: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
forgot_password.success_subtitle: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now log in with your new password.

landing.hero_alt: Crowd at a live concert with stage lights
landing.tagline: Discover events, meet people, and make memories.

entry.title: Social Event Mapper
entry.subtitle: Discover and join events happening around you

not_found.heading: Page Not Found
not_found.body: We couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved, deleted, or perhaps it never existed.

access_denied.heading: Access Denied
access_denied.body: You don't have permission to view this page. If you believe this is a mistake, contact the host or return to the main dashboard.
access_denied.private_event_body: This is a private event. Only approved participants and invited guests are allowed to view its details.
access_denied.admin_body: This admin panel area is only available to administrators.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.language_subtitle: Choose how the web app should be displayed for your account.
profile.language_sync_failed: Language updated locally, but we could not save it to your account.
profile.badges_subtitle: Achievements earned through hosting, participation, and social activity
profile.no_badges_category: No badges in this category yet.

badge_descriptions.TOP_RATED: Achieve a host score of 4.5 or above.

profile.change_password_subtitle: Update your account password without changing profile details.
profile.load_failed: User profile could not be loaded.
profile.public_sections_unavailable: Public profile sections are unavailable right now.
profile.equipment_intro: Share the gear you want other members to see on your profile.
profile.equipment_name_placeholder: Trail shoes, hydration pack, climbing rope...
profile.equipment_description_placeholder: Add a short note about fit, terrain, or why this item matters to you.
profile.photo_requirements: JPG, PNG or WebP · Max {{count}} MB
profile.biography_placeholder: Tell us a bit about yourself
profile.participation_history_subtitle: Hosted events and the events you attended
profile.no_history_subtitle_hosted: Events you create will show up here.
profile.no_history_subtitle_attended: Events you join will show up here.
profile.file_too_large: File must be smaller than {{count}} MB.
profile.password_validation_new_min: New password must be at least {{count}} characters.
profile.password_validation_mismatch: New password and confirmation must match.
profile.password_validation_same_as_old: New password must differ from current password.

home.title: Discover Events
home.subtitle: Find events happening near you
home.map_unavailable_body: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_WEB_API_KEY in your local environment to enable the Google Maps view.
home.no_events_map_body: Try adjusting filters or expanding the radius.

discover.location_prompt: Use your device location for nearby results. Safari requires tapping the button below to allow access.
discover.try_adjusting_filters: Try adjusting your filters or search to find events.
discover.browser_location_generic_error: Could not access your location. Please try again.
discover.browser_location_permission_denied: Location permission was denied. Please allow location access in Safari site settings.
discover.browser_location_unavailable: Your current location could not be determined right now.
discover.browser_location_timeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.
discover.browser_location_https_required: Browser location requires HTTPS or localhost.
discover.browser_location_not_supported: This browser does not support location access.

point_location.env_missing: Set {{variable}} to choose a point on the map.
point_location.hint_click: Click the map to choose the event point.

my_events.title: My Events
my_events.subtitle: Events you've hosted, joined, or attended
my_events.empty_active: No events in progress right now.
my_events.empty_upcoming: No upcoming events. Discover events to join!
my_events.empty_hosted: You haven't hosted any events yet. Create your first event!

create_event.page_subtitle: Fill in the details below to set up your event.
create_event.load_error: Something went wrong loading the form. Please try refreshing the page.
create_event.title: Title
create_event.title_placeholder: Give your event a catchy title
create_event.privacy_hint_public: Public events appear in discovery and anyone can join immediately.
create_event.privacy_hint_protected: Protected events appear in discovery but require host approval to join.
create_event.privacy_hint_private: Private events are invite-based: only invited users can see and join. They do not appear in public discovery.
create_event.created_message: Your event has been successfully created.
create_event.route_search_placeholder: Search a place to add a waypoint...
create_event.route_click_hint: Or click on the map to add a waypoint.
create_event.route_map_placeholder: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_WEB_API_KEY to enable the map for route creation.
create_event.route_empty: No waypoints yet. Add at least 2 to continue.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Your saved events and locations
favorites.empty_events: No favorites yet. Discover events and save them for later!
favorites.limit_reached: You have reached the maximum of {{count}} favorite locations. Remove one to add a new location.
favorites.empty_locations: No favorite locations yet. Add up to {{count}} locations for quick access!

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Private event invitations sent to you by hosts.
invitations.empty_body: When a host invites you to a private event, it will show up here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Updates about your events, invitations, and join requests.
notifications.empty_body: You'll see updates here when something happens with your events.

invitation_modal.title: Invitation details
invitation_modal.sign_in_required: You need to sign in to view this invitation.

status_body.PENDING: This invitation is ready for your response.
status_body.UNKNOWN: This invitation is no longer actionable.

presentation.summary_private_invitation_actor: {{actor}} invited you to a private event.
presentation.summary_private_invitation_default: You received a private event invitation.
presentation.summary_join_submitted_default: Someone wants to join your event.
presentation.summary_event_canceled_default: An event you were interested in has been canceled.

public_profile.equipment_empty_self: You have not added any equipment yet.
public_profile.showcase_subtitle: Moments, snapshots, and visual highlights shared on the profile.
public_profile.showcase_empty_member: No showcase images have been added yet.
public_profile.showcase_empty_self: You have not uploaded any showcase images yet.

edit_event.confirm_critical_message: These changes can require approved participants to reconfirm attendance:
edit_event.confirm_default_message: This update creates a new event version. Participants will see the latest event details.
edit_event.title: Edit Event
edit_event.subtitle: Update event details through the versioned event contract.
edit_event.not_editable: Only active events that have not started can be edited.

interaction.discussion_private_unavailable: Discussion is unavailable for private events.
interaction.discussion_completed_readonly: This event has ended. Past discussion is read-only — share your experience in the Review tab.
interaction.discussion_canceled_closed: This event was canceled. Discussion is closed.
interaction.discussion_in_progress_restricted: Only the host and joined participants can post during the event.
interaction.discussion_placeholder_live: Share an update from the event…
interaction.discussion_placeholder_default: Ask a question or share something with attendees…
interaction.sign_in_discussion: Sign in to join the discussion.
interaction.empty_discussion: No comments yet. Start the conversation!
interaction.sign_in_review: Sign in to leave a review for this event.
interaction.verified_attendee_only: Only verified attendees of this event can leave a review and share memories.
interaction.review_placeholder: What was memorable about this event?
interaction.image_type_error: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
interaction.add_memory_body: Click to upload or drag & drop a photo (optional)
interaction.review_submit_success: Review submitted. Thanks for sharing your experience.
interaction.empty_reviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience.

event_detail.feedback_min: Feedback must be at least {{count}} characters.
event_detail.feedback_max: Feedback must be {{count}} characters or fewer.
event_detail.expiry_warning: This event will be automatically completed in {{count}} day due to inactivity.
event_detail.expiry_warning_other: This event will be automatically completed in {{count}} days due to inactivity.
event_detail.expiry_warning_host_suffix: Update the event to keep it active.
event_detail.reconfirm_body: Event details changed since the version you last confirmed. Review what changed and reconfirm if you can still attend.
event_detail.no_detailed_changes: No detailed changes are available for this update.
event_detail.review_changes: Review these changes before confirming that you can still attend.
event_detail.no_changes_to_review: No changes need review right now.
event_detail.approximate_location_body: This protected event hides its exact address until your participation is approved.
event_detail.map_preview_unconfigured: Map preview is unavailable. Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_WEB_API_KEY to view this location.
event_detail.toast_report_submitted: Thanks. Your report has been submitted for review.
event_detail.exact_directions_after_approval: Exact directions become available after your participation is approved.
event_detail.invite_usernames_placeholder: Enter usernames separated by commas, spaces, or new lines
event_detail.invite_message_placeholder: Add a personal note for invitees...
event_detail.joined_active: You are participating in this event
event_detail.view_ticket_body: Open it on mobile to scan in at the event.
event_detail.update_host_rating: Update your rating for the host
event_detail.rate_experience_copy: Rate the experience from 1 to 5 stars. You can optionally leave a short message for the host.
event_detail.rating_message_placeholder: Share what stood out, how the event felt, or anything the host should know.
event_detail.rating_helper: Optional. If you write one, keep it between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
event_detail.overwrite_rating_notice: Last updated {{date}}. Submitting again overwrites the existing rating.
event_detail.participant_rating_placeholder: Optional note about reliability, communication, or overall experience.
event_detail.participant_rating_helper: Optional, but must be at least {{min}} characters if provided.
event_detail.pending_banner: Your join request is pending approval
event_detail.invited_banner: You have been invited to this event
event_detail.inactive_banner: This event is {{status}} and no longer accepting participants.
event_detail.full_banner: This event has reached its maximum capacity.
event_detail.file_too_large_5mb: File must be 5 MB or smaller.
event_detail.reconfirmation_explainer: {{count}} participant must approve the latest event version before they are fully confirmed again.
event_detail.reconfirmation_explainer_other: {{count}} participants must approve the latest event version before they are fully confirmed again.
event_detail.no_reconfirmation_details: No participant details are available yet.
event_detail.rating_window_open_until: Participant rating window is open until {{date}}
event_detail.not_found_body: This event doesn't exist or has been removed.
event_detail.sign_in_to_save: Sign in to save this event
event_detail.report_event_body: Choose the reason that best describes the issue and add optional context for moderators.
event_detail.report_message_placeholder: Add context that would help moderators understand the issue.
event_detail.cancel_event_body: Are you sure you want to cancel this event? This action cannot be undone.
event_detail.cancel_event_body_with_notice: Are you sure you want to cancel this event? This action cannot be undone. All participants will be notified.
event_detail.end_event_body: Mark this event as completed? Participants will see the event as ended.
event_detail.leave_event_body: Are you sure you want to leave this event?
event_detail.leave_event_body_full: Are you sure you want to leave this event? You will lose your spot and may need to rejoin later.
event_detail.cancel_request_body: Are you sure you want to cancel your join request?
event_detail.cancel_request_body_full: Are you sure you want to withdraw your join request? You can request to join again later if you change your mind.

SPAM_OR_SCAM.label: Spam
SPAM_OR_SCAM.hint: Promotional, misleading, or scam-like event content.

INAPPROPRIATE_CONTENT.label: Inappropriate
INAPPROPRIATE_CONTENT.hint: Offensive, explicit, or otherwise inappropriate event content.

HARASSMENT.label: Harassment
HARASSMENT.hint: Targeted abuse, threats, or harassing behavior.

validation.otp_min_length: Code must be at least 6 characters
validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.username_between: Username must be between 3 and 32 characters.
validation.username_max: Username must be at most 32 characters.
validation.username_invalid: Only letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.
validation.username_backend_rule: Username must be 3-32 characters and use only letters, numbers, or underscores.
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.password_between: Password must be between 8 and 128 characters.
validation.birth_date_future: Birth date cannot be in the future.
validation.gender_invalid: Choose one of the available gender options.

status_descriptions.ACTIVE: Ready to use. Show the live QR in the mobile app at the venue.
status_descriptions.PENDING: Your ticket is being prepared. Check back closer to the event.
status_descriptions.USED: This ticket was scanned at the event.
status_descriptions.EXPIRED: This ticket has expired and can no longer be used.
status_descriptions.CANCELED: This ticket is canceled and cannot be used.

tickets.page_subtitle: Tickets for events you're approved to attend — public, protected, or private. The live scannable QR is available in the mobile app at the venue.
tickets.empty_body: Tickets appear here once you join an event — either by joining a public event, being approved on a protected event, or accepting a private event invitation.
tickets.show_qr_body: For security, the rotating QR token is only generated in the mobile app at the venue. Open the Social Event Mapper mobile app and tap this ticket to display the live QR for entry.
tickets.qr_not_eligible: Ticket is not eligible for QR right now.
